perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white blouse and a denim-style vest, stands in a large warehouse store holding two yellow boxes of snack packs. She smiles and talks directly to the camera. (2) She turns the boxes to show the 'I Love Corn' branding and the Minion characters featured on the packaging. A shopper in a brown shirt walks past in the background. (3) A hand enters the frame from the right, pointing at the pricing and quantity information on the box as the woman continues to speak. (4) The woman brings one of the boxes closer to the lens, emphasizing the '21 Snack Packs' text while maintaining an expressive facial expression.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, energetic instrumental music begins with a fast tempo. A female voice speaks in an excited, high-pitched Mandarin tone. (2) The music continues at a steady volume as the woman narrates details about the product. (3) Faint ambient noise of a busy retail environment, including the sound of shopping carts and muffled background chatter, is audible. (4) The female voice asks a question to the audience with a rising intonation as the video concludes.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Subtitles in Traditional Chinese translating the spoken dialogue about Costco's new product. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: Large yellow characters '哈哈哈哈' (Hahaha) and the 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo appear at the top. (3) Hook Text: '389元討論度超高' (389 Yuan, very high discussion) and '小小兵 香脆玉米粒' (Minions Crunchy Corn Kernels) appear in colorful, variety-show style fonts to grab attention.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Product Showcase -> Pricing Details -> CTA

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 2 male shoppers in background, 1 female shopper in background
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long dark hair, wearing a white puffed-sleeve top under a blue vest and a black skirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A typical Costco warehouse interior with tall industrial shelving, pallets of bulk goods (including Haribo and Wix boxes), and other shoppers with carts.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Product Demo -> Price Reveal -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase a specific snack product (Minions-themed corn kernels) available at Costco, providing information on its price and quantity while engaging the audience by asking for their opinion on its value to drive comments and engagement.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator is highlighting a specific product, showing its price, and asking viewers if they should buy it, which functions as a product recommendation or discovery vlog.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Fast-paced variety-show style text overlays and an interactive closing question.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video follows a standard 'Costco finds' format popular in social media shopping vlogs, focusing on high-interest licensed products (Minions).
